heading: Procedure
body:
**Atlascli:**

Atlas CLI

To return the access logs for a cluster using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas accessLogs list [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas accessLogs list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-accessLogs-list).

**Api:**

Atlas Administration API

To view the database access history using the API, see
[Access Tracking](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/group/endpoint-access-tracking).

**Ui:**

Atlas UI

Use the following procedure to view your database access history
using the Atlas UI:

- On the cluster card, click .

- Select View Database Access
  History.

or

- Click the cluster name.

- Click .

- Select View Database Access History.
